name: encode-ccres-database
description: Long-tail stub for the encode_ccres_database deepmind skill. Query the ENCODE Registry of cis-Regulatory Elements (cCREs) via the SCREEN GraphQL API, or make custom queries to the ENCODE Portal REST API for experiments and files (ChIP-seq peaks, etc.). Use when you want to query regulatory annotations or raw experimental data across human
author: zorai

run.description: Forward a encode_ccres_database CLI invocation. Calls `uv run scripts/encode_portal_api.py` with the deepmind subcommand and args you provide. Read `skills/scientific-skills-gdm/<skill>/SKILL.md` (relative to the repo root) for the canonical workflow and the full subcommand surface. Required env: `ENCODE_CCRES_DATABASE_ARGS` (the deepmind subcommand plus its flags).
